description: Create a custom text field labeled 'Referral Code' with a length of 50 in both the Leads and Contacts modules. Configure the Lead Conversion Data Mapping to ensure the 'Referral Code' field maps from Leads to Contacts during conversion. To verify the setup, create a Lead with the Last Name 'OConnor', Company 'OConnor Industries', and Referral Code 'WINTER-2026', then convert this lead into a Contact and Organization.
